overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Subnautica showing underwater exploration of an alien ocean. The player swims from a bright coral reef through a transitional zone with distinctive rock formations, then enters a dense kelp forest biome with alien flora and fauna.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coral reef with rock archways

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through the shallow reef, observing colorful coral and rock archways

notable_agents.action: small school of fish swimming in the blue water

entered.detail: large natural rock arch covered in coral and brown tube plants
flat red coral plates attached to rock surfaces
clusters of brown tube-shaped vegetation growing on rocks

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a bright, shallow coral reef area. A large rock arch formation dominates the left side while red table coral and brown tube plants dot the sandy seabed. Small fish swim in the distance in the clear blue water.

scene_state.functional_zone: reef edge with seagrass and rock spire

events.description: passing the tall spiral rock spire marking the reef edge

agents.ego_description: swimming past a distinctive spiral rock formation toward the open water and kelp forest

entered.detail: tall spiral-shaped rock spire rising from the sandy seabed
patches of green seagrass covering sandy dunes
dark silhouettes of tall kelp stalks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the main reef behind, the player passes a striking spiral rock pillar. The seabed transitions to sandy dunes covered in seagrass, with the dark outline of a kelp forest visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: kelp forest entry with alien creatures

events.description: water color shifts from bright blue to murky green entering the kelp forest
encountering gasopod creatures floating among the kelp stalks

agents.ego_description: navigating into the kelp forest and observing large floating creatures

notable_agents.action: gasopod creature floating slowly, releasing pink spores into the water
second gasopod swimming near the kelp stalks

entered.detail: tall vertical kelp stalks reaching toward the surface
large arch-shaped structure visible through the kelp in the distance

segments.scene_description: Entering the kelp forest, the water takes on a greenish hue as sunlight filters through dense vegetation. The player encounters gasopods, large round creatures floating among the stalks. A mysterious arch structure is visible in the distance through the kelp.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense kelp forest with limited visibility

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as swimming deeper into the dense kelp

agents.ego_description: swimming carefully through the dense kelp forest where visibility is limited

notable_agents.action: gasopod floating close to the player on the left side

entered.detail: thick canopy of kelp fronds blocking the surface light

segments.scene_description: Deep within the kelp forest, visibility drops dramatically as the player swims through a dense maze of vertical stalks. The water is dark green and murky, with only occasional glimpses of the surface through the thick kelp canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transitions from a bright, open coral reef into the murky depths of a dense kelp forest. It begins by gliding through clear blue water past a large rock arch and vibrant red table coral scattered across a sandy seabed. As the player leaves the reef, the environment shifts toward sandy dunes and seagrass, passing a striking spiral rock pillar while the dark silhouette of a forest emerges ahead. The scene then opens into a greenish expanse where sunlight filters through towering stalks and floating gasopods, revealing a mysterious arch structure in the distance. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the vegetation, where visibility drops dramatically and the water turns a dark, murky green within a dense maze of vertical kelp.
